title: fix(deps): update module github.com/pkg/sftp to v1.13.10
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/pkg/sftp](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp) | `v1.13.9` -> `v1.13.10` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fpkg%2fsftp/v1.13.10?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fpkg%2fsftp/v1.13.9/v1.13.10?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>pkg/sftp (github.com/pkg/sftp)</summary>

### [`v1.13.10`](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/releases/tag/v1.13.10): - maintenance release

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/compare/v1.13.9...v1.13.10)

We’ve made a bunch of little fixes here and there,  and I imagine the tests alone could benefit from a proper release to various systems automations.

#### What's Changed

- Update crypto version to v0.35.0 [sftp#625](https://redirect.github.com/sftp/sftp/issues/625) by [@​kbutz](https://redirect.github.com/kbutz) in [#​626](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/626)
- go.mod: set the minimum version to 1.23.0 as x/crypto by [@​drakkan](https://redirect.github.com/drakkan) in [#​628](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/628)
- run go mod tidy by [@​drakkan](https://redirect.github.com/drakkan) in [#​629](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/629)
- Fix SSH subsystemrequest usage by [@​puellanivis](https://redirect.github.com/puellanivis) in [#​632](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/632)
- Updating go packages by [@​Farokhcpu](https://redirect.github.com/Farokhcpu) in [#​635](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/635)
- add security policy by [@​drakkan](https://redirect.github.com/drakkan) in [#​637](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/637)
- Fix typos in InMemHandler comments by [@​KleeKitz](https://redirect.github.com/KleeKitz) in [#​640](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/640)
- Don't use LICENSE as a self-test sample file by [@​jas4711](https://redirect.github.com/jas4711) in [#​638](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/638)
- Accept '-' in usernames for ls self-test by [@​jas4711](https://redirect.github.com/jas4711) in [#​639](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/639)

#### New Contributors

- [@​kbutz](https://redirect.github.com/kbutz) made their first contribution in [#​626](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/626)
- [@​Farokhcpu](https://redirect.github.com/Farokhcpu) made their first contribution in [#​635](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/635)
- [@​KleeKitz](https://redirect.github.com/KleeKitz) made their first contribution in [#​640](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/640)
- [@​jas4711](https://redirect.github.com/jas4711) made their first contribution in [#​638](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/638)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/pkg/sftp/compare/v1.13.9...v1.13.10>

</details>
